case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. VS ARMSTRONG, JOHN .

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 470123 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, JOHN .

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
